requirement_topic.en: NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) — Compulsory Specification Approval for Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: NRCS许可函（LOA）——电冰箱强制规范批准
requirement_topic.zht: NRCS許可函（LOA）——電冰箱強制規範批准

summary.en: Products that fall under a South African Compulsory Specification (VC) — including household electrical appliances and energy-using products such as refrigerators — may not be sold, imported, or distributed in South Africa unless a Letter of Authority (LOA) has been issued by the NRCS (National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications). The LOA is granted to a South African legal entity (typically the in-country importer or local representative), against a specific model/range, after the NRCS reviews a dossier that includes safety test reports (to the applicable SANS/IEC standard), energy-efficiency evidence, technical documentation, and a sample where required. There is no self-declaration route: the LOA is a positive, pre-market authorisation that must be in hand before customs clearance and sale. NRCS-regulated products are subject to market surveillance, and goods found without a valid LOA can be detained, seized, or ordered off the market.
summary.zh: 属于南非强制规范（VC）范畴的产品——包括家用电器及电冰箱等用能产品——在NRCS（国家强制规范监管机构）签发许可函（LOA）之前，不得在南非销售、进口或分销。LOA签发给南非法律实体（通常为在地进口商或当地代表），针对特定型号／系列，由NRCS审查档案后授予，档案包括安全检测报告（按适用SANS/IEC标准）、能效证据、技术文件及必要时的样品。不存在自我声明途径：LOA是一项前置市场授权，须在清关和销售前持有。NRCS监管产品受市场监督，无有效LOA的货物可被扣留、查封或勒令退市。
summary.zht: 屬於南非強制規範（VC）範疇的產品——包括家用電器及電冰箱等用能產品——在NRCS（國家強制規範監管機構）簽發許可函（LOA）之前，不得在南非銷售、進口或分銷。LOA簽發給南非法律實體（通常為在地進口商或當地代表），針對特定型號／系列，由NRCS審查檔案後授予，檔案包括安全檢測報告（按適用SANS/IEC標準）、能效證據、技術文件及必要時的樣品。不存在自我聲明途徑：LOA是一項前置市場授權，須在清關和銷售前持有。NRCS監管產品受市場監督，無有效LOA的貨物可被扣留、查封或勒令退市。

standards_or_laws: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act 5 of 2008 — establishes NRCS and the Letter of Authority regime
Compulsory Specification VC 9008 — energy efficiency and labelling of electrical and electronic apparatus (LOA scope for refrigerators)
SANS IEC 60335-2-24 — particular safety requirements for refrigerating appliances (supporting safety evidence for the LOA dossier)

summary.en: China's analogous pre-market gate for household refrigerators is the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) scheme administered by SAMR/CNCA. Refrigerators on the CCC catalogue must obtain a CCC certificate (covering safety to GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13 and EMC to GB 4343) from a designated certification body, with factory inspection, before they may be manufactured for sale, sold, or imported into China; the CCC mark must be displayed. Like the NRCS LOA, CCC is a positive pre-market authorisation rather than self-declaration for these products, but it is issued under Chinese law against Chinese (GB) standards and held by the Chinese manufacturer/applicant. CCC and the NRCS LOA are separate national schemes — neither recognises the other automatically.
summary.zh: 中国对家用电冰箱的同类前置市场门槛是由SAMR/CNCA管理的中国强制性认证（CCC）制度。列入CCC目录的电冰箱须由指定认证机构取得CCC证书（涵盖按GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13的安全和按GB 4343的电磁兼容），并经工厂检查，方可在中国生产销售、销售或进口；须展示CCC标志。与NRCS许可函类似，CCC对这些产品是一项前置市场授权而非自我声明，但其依据中国法律、按中国（GB）标准签发，由中国制造商／申请人持有。CCC与NRCS许可函是各自独立的国家制度——彼此不自动承认。
summary.zht: 中國對家用電冰箱的同類前置市場門檻是由SAMR/CNCA管理的中國強制性認證（CCC）制度。列入CCC目錄的電冰箱須由指定認證機構取得CCC證書（涵蓋按GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13的安全和按GB 4343的電磁相容），並經工廠檢查，方可在中國生產銷售、銷售或進口；須展示CCC標誌。與NRCS許可函類似，CCC對這些產品是一項前置市場授權而非自我聲明，但其依據中國法律、按中國（GB）標準簽發，由中國製造商／申請人持有。CCC與NRCS許可函是各自獨立的國家制度——彼此不自動承認。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — administered by SAMR/CNCA; mandatory for household refrigerators
GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13 — safety basis for the CCC certificate
GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2 — EMC basis for the CCC certificate

gap.en: The NRCS LOA is a distinct, non-transferable South African authorisation that a Chinese CCC certificate cannot satisfy: (1) Holder — the LOA must be held by a South African legal entity (importer/local representative), not the Chinese manufacturer; an exporter without a local partner cannot obtain it directly. (2) Standards mapping — the LOA dossier must demonstrate conformity to the applicable SANS/IEC standards (e.g. SANS IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, SANS 941 for energy), so Chinese GB test reports must be re-mapped or supplemented; CCC certificates are not accepted as proof. (3) Timing — the LOA must be issued before importation and sale; goods arriving without it risk detention at Durban/Cape Town and market-surveillance action. (4) Per-model scope — the LOA is granted against specific models/ranges, so new variants generally require dossier updates. Exporters should appoint the South African importer early and align test reports to SANS scope to avoid clearance delays.
gap.zh: NRCS许可函是一项独立、不可转让的南非授权，中国CCC证书无法满足：（1）持有人——LOA须由南非法律实体（进口商／当地代表）持有，而非中国制造商；无当地合作方的出口商不能直接取得。（2）标准对应——LOA档案须证明符合适用SANS/IEC标准（如安全的SANS IEC 60335-2-24、能效的SANS 941），故中国GB检测报告须重新对应或补充；CCC证书不被接受为证明。（3）时间——LOA须在进口和销售前签发；无LOA到货的货物在德班／开普敦面临扣留及市场监督处置风险。（4）按型号范围——LOA针对特定型号／系列授予，新变型通常须更新档案。出口商应尽早委任南非进口商并使检测报告对齐SANS范围，以免清关延误。
gap.zht: NRCS許可函是一項獨立、不可轉讓的南非授權，中國CCC證書無法滿足：（1）持有人——LOA須由南非法律實體（進口商／當地代表）持有，而非中國製造商；無當地合作方的出口商不能直接取得。（2）標準對應——LOA檔案須證明符合適用SANS/IEC標準（如安全的SANS IEC 60335-2-24、能效的SANS 941），故中國GB檢測報告須重新對應或補充；CCC證書不被接受為證明。（3）時間——LOA須在進口和銷售前簽發；無LOA到貨的貨物在德班／開普敦面臨扣留及市場監督處置風險。（4）按型號範圍——LOA針對特定型號／系列授予，新變型通常須更新檔案。出口商應盡早委任南非進口商並使檢測報告對齊SANS範圍，以免清關延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an NRCS Letter of Authority is legally required before refrigerators may be imported, sold, or distributed in South Africa; no self-declaration route; held by a South African entity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required before household refrigerators may be manufactured for sale, sold, or imported in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: NRCS — National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (South Africa)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The NRCS Letter of Authority is a mandatory, pre-market, per-model authorisation held by a South African importer. A Chinese CCC certificate does not satisfy it; the LOA dossier must demonstrate conformity to SANS/IEC standards (SANS IEC 60335-2-24, SANS 941). The LOA must be in hand before customs clearance at Durban/Cape Town and sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] NRCS许可函是由南非进口商持有的强制性、前置、按型号授权。中国CCC证书不能满足；LOA档案须证明符合SANS/IEC标准（SANS IEC 60335-2-24、SANS 941）。LOA须在德班／开普敦清关及销售前持有。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] NRCS許可函是由南非進口商持有的強制性、前置、按型號授權。中國CCC證書不能滿足；LOA檔案須證明符合SANS/IEC標準（SANS IEC 60335-2-24、SANS 941）。LOA須在德班／開普敦清關及銷售前持有。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer, Voltage/Marking Conformity, and Port Clearance (230 V / 50 Hz; Durban, Cape Town)
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商、电压／标识符合性及港口清关（230伏／50赫兹；德班、开普敦）
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商、電壓／標識符合性及港口清關（230伏／50赫茲；德班、開普敦）

summary.en: Placing a refrigerator on the South African market requires an in-country importer or local representative who acts as the responsible party, holds the NRCS Letter of Authority, and is accountable to the NRCS and customs (SARS). The appliance must be rated and marked for the South African mains supply of 230 V, 50 Hz; while the frequency (50 Hz) matches China, the nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase), so rating plates, instructions, and protective settings must reflect 230 V. The plug/cord set must suit South African socket-outlet types (the SANS 164 plug system) or the appliance must ship with an appropriate cord; supply of a non-conforming plug can itself be a compulsory-specification issue. At the ports of Durban and Cape Town, customs clearance is contingent on the valid LOA and correct labelling/marking; non-compliant consignments can be detained or refused entry. Product information and labels should be available in English.
summary.zh: 将电冰箱投放南非市场须有在地进口商或当地代表作为责任方，持有NRCS许可函，并对NRCS和海关（SARS）负责。器具须按南非市电230伏、50赫兹标定和标识；频率（50赫兹）虽与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国的220伏（单相）／380伏（三相），故铭牌、说明书及保护设置须反映230伏。插头／电源线组须适配南非插座类型（SANS 164插头系统），或器具须随附适当电源线；供应不合规插头本身即可能构成强制规范问题。在德班和开普敦港，清关取决于有效LOA及正确标识／标记；不合规货物可被扣留或拒绝入境。产品信息和标签应提供英文。
summary.zht: 將電冰箱投放南非市場須有在地進口商或當地代表作為責任方，持有NRCS許可函，並對NRCS和海關（SARS）負責。器具須按南非市電230伏、50赫茲標定和標識；頻率（50赫茲）雖與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國的220伏（單相）／380伏（三相），故銘牌、說明書及保護設置須反映230伏。插頭／電源線組須適配南非插座類型（SANS 164插頭系統），或器具須隨附適當電源線；供應不合規插頭本身即可能構成強制規範問題。在德班和開普敦港，清關取決於有效LOA及正確標識／標記；不合規貨物可被扣留或拒絕入境。產品資訊和標籤應提供英文。

standards_or_laws: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act 5 of 2008 — responsible-party / importer obligations and market surveillance
SANS 164 series — plug and socket-outlet systems for South Africa (cord/plug conformity)
Compulsory Specification VC 9008 — energy efficiency and labelling (marking and label content) enforced at import

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market, the equivalent responsible party is the Chinese manufacturer/CCC certificate holder, and the appliance is rated and marked for the Chinese mains of 220 V, 50 Hz (single-phase). Plug and cord sets follow the Chinese standard GB 2099/GB 1002 plug system. Import into China is controlled by China Customs (GACC) with reference to the CCC certificate. The Chinese rating (220 V) and plug system differ from South Africa's 230 V nominal voltage and SANS 164 plug system; although both operate at 50 Hz, the voltage tolerance band, marking, and plug/cord configuration are not interchangeable, and the responsible-party/importer model is country-specific.
summary.zh: 对中国境内市场，同类责任方为中国制造商／CCC证书持有人，器具按中国市电220伏、50赫兹（单相）标定和标识。插头和电源线组遵循中国标准GB 2099/GB 1002插头系统。进口中国由中国海关（GACC）参照CCC证书管控。中国额定值（220伏）和插头系统不同于南非230伏标称电压和SANS 164插头系统；虽同为50赫兹，但电压容差带、标识及插头／电源线配置不可互换，且责任方／进口商模式因国而异。
summary.zht: 對中國境內市場，同類責任方為中國製造商／CCC證書持有人，器具按中國市電220伏、50赫茲（單相）標定和標識。插頭和電源線組遵循中國標準GB 2099/GB 1002插頭系統。進口中國由中國海關（GACC）參照CCC證書管控。中國額定值（220伏）和插頭系統不同於南非230伏標稱電壓和SANS 164插頭系統；雖同為50赫茲，但電壓容差帶、標識及插頭／電源線配置不可互換，且責任方／進口商模式因國而異。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — held by the Chinese manufacturer/applicant as responsible party
GB 2099.1 / GB 1002 — Chinese plug and socket-outlet system
Nominal Chinese mains: 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz

gap.en: Several practical market-access gaps arise: (1) Responsible party — South Africa requires an in-country importer/representative to hold the LOA and answer to the NRCS; a Chinese exporter cannot place product without this local entity. (2) Voltage/marking — although both grids are 50 Hz, the appliance must be rated/marked for 230 V (not 220 V); rating plates, manuals, and protective settings must be updated, and the design verified to operate within the South African voltage band. (3) Plug/cord — the cord set must conform to the SANS 164 plug system; the Chinese GB plug is not acceptable for supply, so plugs must be changed or a compliant cord supplied. (4) Port clearance — at Durban and Cape Town, the valid LOA and correct marking/labelling are checked; non-compliant consignments risk detention or refusal. (5) Language — product information and labels should be in English. Exporters should localise marking, cords, and documentation and confirm the importer/LOA before shipment.
gap.zh: 出现若干实际市场准入差距：（1）责任方——南非要求在地进口商／代表持有LOA并对NRCS负责；中国出口商无此当地实体不能投放产品。（2）电压／标识——虽两电网同为50赫兹，器具须按230伏（非220伏）标定／标识；铭牌、手册及保护设置须更新，并须验证设计在南非电压带内运行。（3）插头／电源线——电源线组须符合SANS 164插头系统；中国GB插头不可供应，须更换插头或随附合规电源线。（4）港口清关——在德班和开普敦，须核查有效LOA及正确标记／标识；不合规货物面临扣留或拒绝风险。（5）语言——产品信息和标签应为英文。出口商应本地化标识、电源线和文件，并在出货前确认进口商／LOA。
gap.zht: 出現若干實際市場准入差距：（1）責任方——南非要求在地進口商／代表持有LOA並對NRCS負責；中國出口商無此當地實體不能投放產品。（2）電壓／標識——雖兩電網同為50赫茲，器具須按230伏（非220伏）標定／標識；銘牌、手冊及保護設置須更新，並須驗證設計在南非電壓帶內運行。（3）插頭／電源線——電源線組須符合SANS 164插頭系統；中國GB插頭不可供應，須更換插頭或隨附合規電源線。（4）港口清關——在德班和開普敦，須核查有效LOA及正確標記／標識；不合規貨物面臨扣留或拒絕風險。（5）語言——產品資訊和標籤應為英文。出口商應本地化標識、電源線和文件，並在出貨前確認進口商／LOA。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an in-country responsible party (importer) holding the LOA, 230 V/50 Hz rating and marking, SANS 164 plug conformity, and correct labelling are required for import and sale in South Africa; checked at Durban/Cape Town
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC-holding responsible party, 220 V/50 Hz rating and marking, and GB plug conformity required for sale and import in China; checked by GACC

source.publisher: NRCS — National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (South Africa)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South African market access requires an in-country importer to hold the LOA, the appliance to be rated/marked for 230 V/50 Hz (not 220 V), and the cord/plug to conform to SANS 164. Although the grid shares 50 Hz with China, voltage, plug, and responsible-party requirements differ. Valid LOA and correct marking are verified at Durban and Cape Town before clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非市场准入须由在地进口商持有LOA、器具按230伏／50赫兹（非220伏）标定／标识，且电源线／插头符合SANS 164。虽然电网与中国同为50赫兹，但电压、插头及责任方要求不同。有效LOA和正确标识在德班和开普敦清关前核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非市場准入須由在地進口商持有LOA、器具按230伏／50赫茲（非220伏）標定／標識，且電源線／插頭符合SANS 164。雖然電網與中國同為50赫茲，但電壓、插頭及責任方要求不同。有效LOA和正確標識在德班和開普敦清關前核查。
